sent_simp: 她受访时谈到了自己的创业经历。
sent_trad: 她受訪時談到了自己的創業經歷。
pinyin: Tā shòufǎng shí tándào le zìjǐ de chuàngyè jīnglì.
english: When she was interviewed, she talked about her entrepreneurial experience.

sent_simp: 两人共谋陷害了无辜的同事。
sent_trad: 兩人共謀陷害了無辜的同事。
pinyin: Liǎng rén gòngmóu xiànhài le wúgū de tóngshì.
english: The two conspired to frame an innocent colleague.

pinyin: Tā zài huì shàng xiàng dàjiā zhìqiàn.
english: He apologized to everyone at the meeting.

sent_simp: 慰安妇是日军侵略中遭受深重苦难的受害者。
sent_trad: 慰安婦是日軍侵略中遭受深重苦難的受害者。
pinyin: Wèiānfù shì Rìjūn qīnlüè zhōng zāoshòu shēnzhòng kǔnàn de shòuhài zhě.
english: Comfort women were victims who suffered greatly under Japanese military aggression.

sent_simp: 中秋节是一家人团圆的日子。
sent_trad: 中秋節是一家人團圓的日子。
pinyin: Zhōngqiūjié shì yī jiā rén tuányuán de rìzi.
english: Mid-Autumn Festival is a day for the whole family to reunite.
